videos.title: Yachts anchored off the Marbella coast
videos.description: Aerial drone view of two motor yachts anchored off the Marbella coastline with the Sierra Blanca mountains behind.

videos.title: Departing Puerto Banús by yacht
videos.description: Bow-shot of a charter yacht slipping out of Puerto Banús marina past the working fleet, with Hotel Benabola in the background.

videos.title: Boat party in Marbella
videos.description: Group of guests on the flybridge of a luxury yacht enjoying a sunny day in Puerto Banús.

videos.title: All drinks included — fridge on board
videos.description: Our on-board fridge stocked with cava, white wine, beer, soft drinks and water — included with every Marbella charter.
